appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance sections for CLI (Phase 4 Parameter Search) and agent-browser (Phase 4 Winner Review)

notes: All 17 assertions passed. Ground truth labels (site/data/labels/2025-W43.json) reference detection IDs from Oct 2025 validate-mode data, while regression dataset is Jan 2024, so all fitness scores are 0.0 — this is expected and correct behavior. The search infrastructure (CLI, perturbation, fitness, provenance, winner export, winner review) all function correctly as tested by unit tests and direct invocation.
